evidence_summary: Focused fixture package migration, CLI package migration, runtime/eMLF parity, public-surface, and backend parity checks passed; git diff --check passed; cabal build all && cabal test passed with 2496 examples; the diff proves existing fixtures through package-mode file helpers, adds durable static package-root and search-path fixtures, aligns docs around local package mode, and records a self-boot readiness ledger without claiming self-hosting or widening package-substrate scope.

completion_pointers.text: Completed by round-250; evidence: existing recursive/unified fixtures run through package-mode file helpers, static package-root and search-path fixtures prove durable local package mode, docs describe one-file inputs only as trivial packages, and the self-boot readiness ledger records remaining compiler-in-.mlfp gaps without overclaiming self-hosting.
